text.content:
Injuries • Fire • Fiery Footsies

Injury Card

Fiery Footsies

You suddenly have an uncontrollable urge to do a hot shoe dance. Your feet, however, seem to be on fire, and despite your best efforts, you can't put them out! It's like having your own personal campfire.

Dancing Flames
Treatment

Cool your feet with water from a nearby source or a friend's water skin. Or maybe try doing a rain dance to summon a helpful drizzle. Or simply enjoy the warm ambiance.

Details

  • Category: Fire

  • Severity: Minor

  • Damage: 2 Hit Points

  • Duration: 10

  • Status Effect: none

Metadata

The metadata is used to generate the Injury in the chat window. Poorly formatted metadata will result in broken or nonfunctional injuries.

  • journaltype: injury

  • category: Fire

  • odds: 10

  • foldername: Injuries

  • title: Fiery Footsies

  • imagetitle: Dancing Flames

  • image: icons/magic/fire/flame-burning-creature-skeleton.webp

  • description: You suddenly have an uncontrollable urge to do a hot shoe dance. Your feet, however, seem to be on fire, and despite your best efforts, you can't put them out! It's like having your own personal campfire.

  • treatment: Cool your feet with water from a nearby source or a friend's water skin. Or maybe try doing a rain dance to summon a helpful drizzle. Or simply enjoy the warm ambiance.

  • severity: Minor

  • damage: 2

  • duration: 60

  • action: Apply the Fire Injury

  • statuseffect: none

Injuries • Fire • Flaming Feathered Fiasco

Injury Card

Flaming Feathered Fiasco

You find a colorful, fiery feathered creature doing a triumphant dance. As you approach, it emits a brilliant burst of flames, leaving you with singed eyebrows and an unusual craving for spicy foods.

Scorched Plume Surprise
Treatment

Seek out a skilled chef for a taste of surprisingly beneficial spicy dishes with healing properties.

Details

  • Category: Fire

  • Severity: Moderate

  • Damage: 6 Hit Points

  • Duration: 50

  • Status Effect: Charmed

Metadata

The metadata is used to generate the Injury in the chat window. Poorly formatted metadata will result in broken or nonfunctional injuries.

Injuries • Fire • Marshmallow Fingers

Injury Card

Marshmallow Fingers

After a particularly intense encounter with a flame, your fingers now emanate a warm orange glow reminiscent of a perfectly toasted marshmallow. They are oddly satisfying to heat up cold soup, but be cautious when shaking hands!

Smoldering Delight
Treatment

Immerse fingers in ice-cold water for 1 hour or until the glow subsides

Details

  • Category: Fire

  • Severity: Minor

  • Damage: 2 Hit Points

  • Duration: 300

  • Status Effect: Charmed

Metadata

The metadata is used to generate the Injury in the chat window. Poorly formatted metadata will result in broken or nonfunctional injuries.

  • duration: 1800

  • statuseffect: Charmed

Injuries • Fire • Roasted Rump Injury

Injury Card

Roasted Rump Injury

In the heat of battle, you experience a close encounter with a fire… wall torch maybe? Anyway, your backside got a little too toasty, leaving you with charred buttocks. The smell of burnt bacon follows you wherever you go.

Singed Cheeks
Treatment

Cooling poultices or spells to soothe the burn

Details

  • Category: Fire

  • Severity: Moderate

  • Damage: 7 Hit Points

  • Duration: 20

  • Status Effect: Exhaustion

Metadata

The metadata is used to generate the Injury in the chat window. Poorly formatted metadata will result in broken or nonfunctional injuries.

  • category: Fire

  • odds: 5

  • statuseffect: Exhaustion

Injuries • Fire • Singed Beard Syndrome

Injury Card

Singed Beard Syndrome

Lingering aftermath of an unexpected fireball mishap. Your once luscious beard now resembles a charcoal briquette. Smoke still rises whenever you speak.

Fiery Facial Farewell
Treatment

Apply a soothing ointment made of aloe vera and crushed ice from a frost giant's freezer.

Details

  • Category: Fire

  • Severity: Minor

  • Damage: 2 Hit Points

  • Duration: 100

  • Status Effect: Charmed

The metadata is used to generate the Injury in the chat window. Poorly formatted metadata will result in broken or nonfunctional injuries.

Injuries • Fire • Singed Socks Syndrome

Injury Card

Singed Socks Syndrome

Suffering from Singed Socks Syndrome, your feet feel like they've danced on a bonfire. The heat emanating from your boots could roast a turkey. Be careful, or you might leave a trail of cinders behind.

Fiery Foot Fries
Treatment

Soak your feet in a potion of frost, or find a pair of enchanted ice skates to cool those tootsies down.

Details

  • Category: Fire

  • Severity: Moderate

  • Damage: 6 Hit Points

  • Duration: 300

  • Status Effect: Blind

Metadata

The metadata is used to generate the Injury in the chat window. Poorly formatted metadata will result in broken or nonfunctional injuries.
